ogTitle: Steeple Flat vs Stewarts River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Steeple Flat and Stewarts River.
heading: Steeple Flat vs Stewarts River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Steeple Flat, New South Wales and Stewarts River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stewarts River has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Steeple Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Steeple Flat or Stewarts River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Steeple Flat has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Stewarts River scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Steeple Flat scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Stewarts River scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Steeple Flat or Stewarts River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stewarts River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
